operating_ranges.evidence: This message occurs if the steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar and the boiler starts to heat to the nominal value

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: after water filter life time cycle
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The water filter has to be changed after its life time cycle. Otherwise the boilers will be damaged due to the limescale

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_heating
fault_conditions.symptoms: occurs if the steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar
fault_conditions.evidence: This message occurs if the steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar and the boiler starts to heat to the nominal value

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_emptied
fault_conditions.symptoms: occurs if the steam boiler has been emptied or depressurized
fault_conditions.evidence: This message occurs if the steam boiler has been emptied or depressurized. The coffee machine has to be switched off (main switch)

fault_conditions.name: empty_steam_boiler
fault_conditions.evidence: Empty steam boiler... Contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: depressurise_steam_boiler
fault_conditions.evidence: Depressurise steam boiler... Contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: fill_steam_boiler
fault_conditions.symptoms: water level is lower than the safety level
fault_conditions.evidence: If the water level is lower than the safety level the steam boiler has to be filled

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_rinse_required
fault_conditions.description: Rinse necessary. The steam boiler isn't allowed to heat before the machine is rinsed
fault_conditions.symptoms: steam boiler has to wait until the rinse button is pressed before it is allowed to heat
fault_conditions.evidence: After switching on the coffee machine, the steam boiler has to wait until the rinse button is pressed before it is allowed to heat

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_security_probe_problem
fault_conditions.evidence: Steam boiler security probe problem. Contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: steam_pressure_too_low
fault_conditions.description: Steam pressure too low for milk products
fault_conditions.symptoms: insufficient steam pressure to produce milk product
fault_conditions.evidence: Wait until the steam pressure is high enough to produce a milk product

maintenance_actions.name: steam_wand_purge
maintenance_actions.evidence: After every use of the steam wand (steam arm) it is necessary to wipe and purge it

maintenance_actions.name: startup_purge
maintenance_actions.evidence: To initialise the coffee machine, it is necessary to press the blinking purge button after each start-up

maintenance_actions.name: water_filter_change
maintenance_actions.evidence: The water filter has to be changed after its life time cycle. Otherwise the boilers will be damaged due to the limescale

assumptions.statement: Steam boiler is part of the 0.8L boiler system for steam generation
assumptions.reason: Manual references steam boiler separately from coffee boiler, and component role specifies steam generation function

assumptions.statement: Hot water dispensing can be controlled by either steam boiler or coffee boiler
assumptions.reason: Manual shows hot water quantity can be set in seconds (steam boiler) or ticks (coffee boiler)
